summary: Completed all 12 steps. Implemented resolve_project_id() in models/scope.py, fixed TaskInterceptor to resolve project_root to logical project_id and inject _project_root in event payloads, fixed TargetedReconciler to accept and thread both project_id and project_root, fixed BaseStage task tools to use project_root for taskmaster calls, fixed ReconciliationHarness to extract project_root from event payloads. Full test suite: 184 passed, 0 failed.

Completed all 13 steps plus prerequisite. Fixed three interrelated bugs in the fused-memory unified API: (1) Category filter now includes Graphiti results when requested categories overlap with GRAPHITI_PRIMARY, with best-effort category inference for single-category filters. (2) delete_memory(store='graphiti') now calls remove_edge instead of remove_episode, matching the edge UUIDs returned by search. (3) Added remove_edge method to GraphitiBackend using EntityEdge.get_by_uuid + edge.delete. Updated MCP tool docs to accurately describe the contract. Full test suite: 195 passed, 0 failed.

Completed all 6 steps. Fixed two bugs: (1) memory.py now posts to '{base_url}/mcp' without trailing slash, avoiding the Starlette 307 redirect. (2) app.py lifespan creates httpx.AsyncClient(follow_redirects=True) as a safety net. Added 3 new tests: test_posts_to_correct_url_path (URL path assertion), test_lifespan_sets_follow_redirects (client config check), test_307_redirect_followed_with_follow_redirects (regression test for original bug). Full test suite: 166 passed, 0 failed.
